Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://expertelectricalservices.com.au/electrician-blaxland/" | wc -c && curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://expertelectricalservices.com.au/electrician-blaxland/" | python3 -c "
import sys
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Check if content is in noscript or data attributes
import re
# Look for data-rocket or noscript content
noscript = re.findall\(r'<noscript>\(.*?\)</noscript>', html, re.DOTALL\)
for i, ns in enumerate\(noscript[:5]\):
    text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', ns\).strip\(\)
    if text and len\(text\) > 30:
        print\(f'NOSCRIPT {i}: {text[:200]}'\)

# Look for JSON-LD structured data
for m in re.finditer\(r'application/ld\\+json[^>]*>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\):
    print\(f'JSON-LD: {m.group\(1\)[:500]}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://expertelectricalservices.com.au/electrician-blaxland/" | python3 << 'PYEOF' import sys, re, json html = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Extract all JSON-LD blocks jsonld_blocks = re.findall\(r'type="application/ld\\+json"[^>]*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for i, block in enumerate\(jsonld_blocks\): try: data = json.loads\(block\) print\(f"\\n=== JSON-LD Block {i+1} ==="\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:3000]\) except: pass # Also try to find the actual page content in data attributes or hidden divs print\("\\n=== SEARCHING FOR BODY CONTENT ==="\) # Try to find content in wp-content areas content_matches = re.findall\(r'class="[^"]*entry-content[^"]*"[^>]*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for c in content_matches: text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', c\).strip\(\) if len\(text\) > 50: print\(f"ENTRY: {text[:500]}"\) # Try elementor content elementor = re.findall\(r'class="[^"]*elementor-widget-text[^"]*"[^>]*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for e in elementor: text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', e\).strip\(\) if len\(text\) > 50: print\(f"ELEMENTOR: {text[:500]}"\) PYEOF)

Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://expertelectricalservices.com.au/electrician-blaxland/" | python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, re, json

html = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# Try different JSON-LD extraction
matches = re.findall\(r'application/ld\\+json["\\x27\\s]*>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
for i, m in enumerate\(matches\):
    m = m.strip\(\)
    if m:
        try:
            data = json.loads\(m\)
            print\(f"\\n=== BLOCK {i+1} ==="\)
            print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:5000]\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f"BLOCK {i+1} PARSE ERROR: {e}"\)
            print\(m[:500]\)
PYEOF)
